findings.message: Bath.right is a window on the east exterior. The intent is a frosted/obscured pane (noted in comments) but the DSL itself has no separate 'frosted' wall type, so the renderer treats it as a normal window.

Although the bath is now buffered by an Entry vestibule, in a studio the bath door is still in the same circulation envelope as the living area. This is inherent to studio typology and is mitigated, not eliminated.
